question: Declare an addition operator that can be used to add two Box objects and returns final Box object. Where the structure of Class Box is Private members: Length, Breath, Height. Public: double getVolume(), void setLength(double length), void setBreath(double breath), void setheight(double height), And an operator overloading function that will add three properties of two boxes and assign them to a third box.

test_cases.expected:
Box1 Volume: 150
Box2 Volume: 64
Box3 Volume: 504

driver: int main() { Box box1, box2, box3; box1.setLength(10.0); box1.setBreath(5.0); box1.setHeight(3.0); box2.setLength(8.0); box2.setBreath(4.0); box2.setHeight(2.0); box3 = box1 + box2; cout << "Box1 Volume: " << box1.getVolume() << endl; cout << "Box2 Volume: " << box2.getVolume() << endl; cout << "Box3 Volume: " << box3.getVolume() << endl; return 0; }
